summary.work_completed: Produced Low-Level Design (LLD) for FR-SCENE-001 covering R3F canvas configuration, lighting, OrbitControls, and integration with GridPlane and InstancedBricks
key_findings: OrbitControls LEFT mouse must be freed for brick placement (critical gotcha)
R3F pointer events on meshes differ from DOM events — placement handlers must attach to GridPlane mesh, not Canvas
Three.js geometries require manual disposal to prevent memory leaks
InstancedMesh count must be dynamically managed to avoid silent failures

artifacts.name: LLD for FR-SCENE-001
artifacts.description: Complete low-level design with component architecture, data models, sequence diagrams, error handling, security, and testing strategy

human_review_required.reason: Design Review Gate 6a requires human validation of architecture decisions before implementation proceeds

recommended_actions: Review LLD for technical soundness and alignment with PRD acceptance criteria
Verify OrbitControls configuration and event handling approach
Confirm performance targets (≥30 FPS with 500 bricks) are achievable with proposed InstancedBricks approach
Check security considerations (CSP, XSS prevention) are adequate
Approve LLD to allow frontend-test agent to proceed with test implementation
